name: Corset Curse
description:
You've been hypnotized! You constantly feel the pressure of an imaginary cinched corset and high heels. Your mind is slowly shifting soft tissue into your hips, buns, and thighs, giving you a very ample derriere. Your buxom bum even jiggles when you walk; a peculiar feeling that makes you blush profusely! As time goes by, you are finding it more difficult to move around without wearing a pair of high heels. You've been hypno-corseted!
